name: Foolish Outburst
additional_info: Steals 40% of the Tempo used. Every point in Intelligence below 50 will reduce the Tempo steal by 0.66%, capping at a minimum of 23.33% of the Tempo absorbed with 25 Intelligence.
desc: Blocking or parrying a vent will absorb the Tempo cost of the vent. A Tactician steadies the course of battle.
